channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [WATCHLIST: city council] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Meet the candidates: Questionnaire for Bradenton City Council Ward 4
item.description: Leading up to the 2026 Florida primary (August 19) and general election (Nov. 3), Tampa Bay 28 contacted qualified candidates for Bradenton City Council Ward 4.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Expedia names St. Lucia top island destination for couples in 2026 travel rankings
item.description: Expedia's 2026 island list is out. St. Lucia leads with a 125% search surge. See the top picks and tips to book.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Big Bear bald eagle Jackie rescued by Los Angeles wildlife officials after fight with rival eagles
item.description: A member of the beloved Big Bear bald eagle family was rescued by wildlife officials after it was involved in a fight, according to Friends of Big Bear Valley and the LA County Parks and Recreation.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trial begins for man charged in 2024 death at Ruskin marina
item.description: The trial for a man charged with second-degree murder in the 2024 death of another man at a Ruskin Marina began on Tuesday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Smithsonian museum chief rejects criticism of its leaders as radical activists
item.description: The director of the Smithsonian's National Museum of American History pushed back Tuesday against a recent White House report that branded the institution's leadership as radical activists who cannot be trusted.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trial date set for former Tampa District 5 candidate after pulling gun at forum
item.description: Former Hillsborough County District 5 candidate Elvis Piggott was in court on Tuesday for a pretrial hearing on charges stemming from an incident at a candidate forum last year, where he pulled a gun.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Polk County shoe repair expert becomes social media sensation as ‘America’s Cobbler’
item.description: Inside a small shoe repair shop in Polk County, Jim McFarland is keeping a fading American trade alive while introducing the art of cobbling to an entirely new generation.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Man arrested after fentanyl investigation chase ends in business crash
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Manatee County sheriff shuts down alleged illegal gambling operation in Bradenton
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Inflammation is still the ‘silent killer’
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Southwest Airlines adds 4 Sarasota flights for winter
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Charges pending for mom whose son, 2, was fatally shot in Florida
[WATCHLIST: hurricane] [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] When is the peak of hurricane season? Is it now? See Bertha maps
[City of Tampa] Tampa Convention Center Welcomes Sigma Gamma Rho Sorority, Inc. for 61st International Biennial Boule

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] McDonald’s latest breakfast sandwich adds a sweet twist
item.description: McDonald’s has added a Honey Brown Butter Bacon, Egg & Cheese Biscuit to its breakfast lineup for a limited time at U.S. restaurants.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lakeland takes next step to 1-year moratorium on data center developments
item.description: The City of Lakeland takes the next step to a 1-year moratorium on data center developments with the first reading of the ordinance.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] SafeSport Center to begin publicizing names of people who go on its banned list
item.description: The U.S. Center for SafeSport began making public announcements of people placed on its disciplinary database Tuesday, a move designed to increase transparency.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] $23k in cash, dozens of gambling machines seized at illegal Bradenton operation: MCSO
item.description: Manatee County Sheriff's Office announced Tuesday an illegal gambling operation in Bradenton has been shut down.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Charlie Kirk sign removed from Tennessee highway after veterans object
item.description: Signs honoring conservative activist Charlie Kirk are being removed from a highway in Tennessee after Vietnam veterans objected to their placement.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Oklahoma lineman Eddy Pierre-Louis fulfills childhood dream at SEC Media Days in Tampa
item.description: The Tampa native said he made a video at age 7 declaring he would play for Oklahoma. Now he's a team leader heading into the SEC season.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tourist couple stabbed near Athens’ Acropolis in apparent random attack
item.description: A man allegedly stabbed and wounded two tourists near Athens’ Acropolis before being detained Tuesday in what police said appeared to be a random attack.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Former Florida jail official pleads guilty to accepting bribe, smuggling cell phone
item.description: Accepting a bribe and smuggling a cell phone at a detention facility in Florida has a 50-year-old Inverness man facing a maximum of 15 years in federal prison.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] UK players joining Powerball could drive US jackpots even higher
item.description: Powerball is expanding to the U.K., adding millions of new players and potentially driving jackpots higher for lottery players in the U.S.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa hosts SEC Media Days for the first time ever
item.description: It's a landmark week for both the city of Tampa and the world of college football. For the first time in history, Tampa is hosting SEC Media Days — the unofficial kickoff to the college football season.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hillsborough Schools discusses plan to reduce classroom screen time
item.description: Hillsborough County School Board members are expected to meet again Tuesday to discuss the district’s new screen time guidance aimed at creating a better balance between technology use and unplugged time spent working and interacting in the classroom.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hillsborough man arrested, accused of kicking and hitting dog: Deputies
item.description: Romar Carter, 23, faces an aggravated animal cruelty charge after deputies said witnesses saw him hitting and kicking his dog with a leash Sunday night in Hillsborough County.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota considers new rules for downtown events
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Charlotte County traffic stop leads to meth trafficking arrest
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Dogs Inc shares indoor exercises to keep dogs active during summer heat
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] The Columbia Restaurant
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] 11 a.m. tropical update: Bertha encounters hostile winds

[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Why is Trump putting tariffs on Canada? It isn't due to wildfires yet
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Bahamas-Florida airline shut down after crash that killed 10
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida residents 3rd-most financially distressed. What that means
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida woman falls from tree, dies while picking mangoes
[WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Everything you need to know about Tropical Storm Bertha in 60 seconds
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Are you getting a Social Security check this week? See schedule
[The Florida Channel] 7/21/26 Capitol Update Extended: New Statue at State Capitol Honors Legacy of Exploration
item.description: 7/21/26 Capitol Update Extended: New Statue at State Capitol Honors Legacy of Exploration first appeared on The Florida Channel As part of the America250FL celebration, the Governor installed a new statue of Ponce de Leon at the State Capitol. 7/21/26 Capitol Update Extended: New Statue at State Capitol Honors Legacy of Exploration first appeared on The Florida Channel

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Former New Mexico AG wants to step back into Epstein ranch investigations
item.description: Former New Mexico AG Hector Balderas says federal officials ignored his Epstein investigation and withheld records tied to Zorro Ranch allegations.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Defense Department identifies US service member killed in Iraq during 'controlled detonation' of Iranian drone
item.description: The Department of Defense identified the soldier killed on Sunday in northern Iraq during a "controlled detonation" of a downed Iranian attack drone.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US identifies soldier killed during controlled detonation of Iranian drone
item.description: Trump skips a dignified transfer at Dover as U.S.-Iran fighting enters day 10, with nearly 100 troops injured and no peace talks in sight.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane, tropical storm] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tropical Storm Bertha strengthens, Gulf Coast flood risk grows
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha formed Monday evening and strengthened overnight in the Gulf, continuing to slowly organize as it tracks near the northern Gulf Coast, according to the National Hurricane Center (NHC).

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Preservationists claim old Eagle Lake schoolhouse slated for demolition qualifies for massive grants
item.description: A newly formed historical society is fighting to save the last historic building in Eagle Lake from a city plan to tear it down and build a new city hall complex.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] SPONSORED SEGMENT: The Way Concierge Medicine
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota County still needs poll workers for Aug. 18 primary
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] 🔴 LIVE | Hearing begins in lawsuit challenging James Fishback’s eligibility for governor
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] How far north are Burmese pythons found in Florida? See range
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Taylor Farms still most likely source of cyclospora outbreak, FDA says
[WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Is there anything else in tropics besides Tropical Storm Bertha?
